UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the swift, righteous fury of Achilles as he charges into battle, ready to defend with unwavering determination.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the storm clouds and wind, focusing instead on the Knight's decisive action.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Knight of Swords card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, flutes, percussion, energetic, bright, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the reckless and hotheaded nature of the duelist, the broken sword and storm debris symbolizing a hasty decision leading to chaos
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the victory or ego of the duelist, as the reversed Knight of Swords suggests a potential downfall due to impulsive actions
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Knight of Swords card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, flutes, percussion, minor, introspective, suspenseful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Swords card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Joan's courage, impulsiveness, and the swiftness of her actions as she charges forward with her sword raised.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the recklessness aspect, instead focus on the determination and conviction in her actions.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Knight of Swords card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, flutes, percussion, uplifting, energetic, major, instrumental
